pitchSequence.description: Slider, called strike
Slow bouncer to short, tough play for Slauson, fires to first not in time. Bradleys is aboard with a single.

notes: 2-pitch AB, infield single on a slow bouncer to short. Count was 0-1 when put in play. Righty vs righty. Slauson's throw not in time.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play
Fastball swung on and missed
Fastball rings him up, called strike three

notes: 3-pitch AB, strikeout looking on a called third strike fastball. Count was 0-2 when struck out. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball misses low
Fastball up and in
Ripped foul and out of play
Driven to deep right field, Palomar racing over, hooks foul into the stands
Hit in the air to shallow left, Cortez backing up and makes the catch

notes: 5-pitch AB, flyout to Cortez in shallow left. Count was 2-2 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina. Note: text says Cortez (2B) backing up in shallow left to make the catch.

pitchSequence.description: Breaking ball misses high
Fouled back and out of play
And he fouls another one off
Stolen base by Bradleys; Gasparro fires to second, not in time
Lined into shallow right, falls in for a hit. Bradleys scores from second. RBI single for Colbert.

notes: 5-pitch AB (including a pitch where Bradleys steals second). RBI single to shallow right. Count was 2-2 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina. Bradleys scores from second. Score now 5-2.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball called a strike
Curveball called strike two
Fly ball, deep left field. Parker drifting back, makes the catch on the warning track to end the inning.

notes: 3-pitch AB, flyout to Parker on the warning track in deep left. Count was 0-2 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina. Loons score one run in the inning. Score now 5-2.

pitchSequence.description: Hit in the air to left field. Bradleys is under it and makes the catch.

notes: 1-pitch AB, flyout to left field. Put in play on the first pitch. Switch hitter bats right vs RHP Sanborn. Note: text says Bradleys (RF in lineup) makes the catch in LF.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball high and tight
Plunks Patterson on the back of the leg, hit by pitch

notes: 2-pitch AB, hit by pitch. Count was 1-0 when hit. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Sanborn. Patterson had a double and a home run earlier.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball, one and oh
Driven to deep right field, sails over the wall for a two-run homer

notes: 2-pitch AB, two-run home run to deep right field. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Righty vs righty. Patterson scores from first. Score now 7-2 Cars.

pitchSequence.description: Breaking ball called strike one
Fastball misses low
Lined right into the glove of Colbert at second

notes: 3-pitch AB, lineout to Colbert at second base. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play
Popped up on the infield. Stipe is calling for it and makes the catch to end the inning.

notes: 2-pitch AB, pop out to Stipe at shortstop. Count was 0-1 when put in play. Cars score two runs in the inning on Nakamura's two-run homer. Score now 7-2 Cars.
